channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine's drones take the war to Russia
item.description: Ukraine's sustained and sophisticated drone warfare has knocked out refineries, tilted the battlefield balance and brought the war home to some Russia...

item.title: Trump's "communist" midterm message
item.description: President Trump needs a potent message to reverse his party's bleak midterm outlook — and he's found it in the rise of democratic socialists in New Yo...

item.title: Scoop: Powerful Anthropic model, Fable 5, on track to return soon
item.description: The Trump administration is close to allowing Anthropic to restore access to its powerful Fable 5 model, which has been offline for 15 days because of...

item.title: Scoop: Cori Bush won't commit to voting for Jeffries in 2027 if she wins her seat back
item.description: Former Rep. Cori Bush (D-Mo.), in an interview with Axios on Friday, declined to commit to voting for House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) a...
